briefs.title: BC Corporation Rules Updated to Recognize Indigenous Nation Ownership and New Partnership Type
briefs.summary: BC updated its Business Corporations Regulation to formally recognize corporations wholly owned by Indigenous nations and to define a new category called 'professional limited liability partnership' (a firm where licensed professionals practice together with limited personal liability).
briefs.action_required: If your corporation is owned by or structured through an Indigenous nation, review how you report ownership under BC corporate rules.
